data.id: TR-PICUS-PAYLOAD-001: Malware Marker Mutex Creation (BlackByte, Emotet, etc.)
data.name: TR-PICUS-PAYLOAD-001: Malware Marker Mutex Creation (BlackByte, Emotet, etc.)
data.description: Detects creation of well-known malware mutex patterns used as execution markers. Monitors for GUIDs and named mutexes associated with BlackByte ransomware, Emotet, and other malware families. Processes creating these mutexes from temp/user-writable paths are highly suspicious. MITRE T1112.
data.contents: process.mutexes contains '{1f07524d-fb13-4d5e-8e5c-c3373860df25}' OR process.mutexes contains '{CB191C19-1D2D-45FC-9092-6DB462EFEAC6}' OR process.mutexes contains 'bc2dc004028c4f0303f5e49984983352' OR process.mutexes contains 'YeucqCcpgapiZISEdRSNiL' OR process.mutexes contains 'Emotet' OR process.mutexes contains 'Global\\{' AND (process.path contains '\\Temp\\' OR process.path contains '\\AppData\\' OR process.path contains '\\Downloads\\' OR process.path contains '\\ProgramData\\')
